scenarios.title: Clean first run
scenarios.expected_recovery: Show a write-effect preview before initialization.
scenarios.success_signal: Runtime is initialized only after explicit confirmation.

scenarios.title: Invalid Mission intake
scenarios.expected_recovery: Focus the first invalid field without invoking a mutation.
scenarios.success_signal: All deterministic field errors are resolved.

scenarios.title: Complete Mission intake
scenarios.expected_recovery: Preserve created refs and retry only unresolved next-action work.
scenarios.success_signal: Mission and intake refs are durable and selected Flow is stable.

scenarios.title: Active Flow with one safe action
scenarios.expected_recovery: Render a structured OperatorError and retain the selected Flow.
scenarios.success_signal: The durable next-action report advances exactly once.

scenarios.title: Partial multi-step mutation
scenarios.expected_recovery: Reuse existing Mission refs and resume only the incomplete operation.
scenarios.success_signal: No duplicate Mission or intake evidence is created.

scenarios.title: Multiple interactions and decisions
scenarios.expected_recovery: Preserve independent selection, draft, and refs for every item.
scenarios.success_signal: Durable completion advances to the next unresolved item.

scenarios.title: Provider progress
scenarios.expected_recovery: Show stale heartbeat or supported run controls from durable state.
scenarios.success_signal: Terminal status and event cursor survive reconnect.

scenarios.title: Required verification failure
scenarios.expected_recovery: Expose consequence, command evidence, and catalog-owned recovery actions.
scenarios.success_signal: A passing fresh verification report replaces the blocker.

scenarios.title: Bounded repair
scenarios.expected_recovery: Keep the parent blocked when the repair budget is exhausted.
scenarios.success_signal: Repair closure cites the accepted attempt and fresh verification.

scenarios.title: Completed read-only closure
scenarios.success_signal: Closure remains readable without mutation controls.

scenarios.title: Follow-up Flow
scenarios.expected_recovery: Preserve source closure and retry only new-Flow creation.
scenarios.success_signal: A new Flow cites the handoff while the source Flow stays unchanged.

scenarios.title: Partial and offline reads
scenarios.expected_recovery: Retain last-known data, label failed resources, and disable unsafe mutations.
scenarios.success_signal: Reconnect refreshes only failed reads and revalidates action safety.
